tickets.title: Architecture and core conventions
tickets.description: Establish the shared conventions and foundations the rest of the build depends on.

tickets.title: Freeze core status vocabulary
tickets.description: Standardize record states to a single shared enum across validation, storage, and export.
acceptance_criteria: one status enum defined and documented
all modules updated to the shared states
a lint check rejects ad-hoc status strings

tickets.title: Infrastructure and dev environment
tickets.description: Everything needed to run, build, and deploy the system reliably.

tickets.title: Create monorepo and local dev stack
tickets.description: Bootstrap a modular monorepo with the API app, worker, and local datastores runnable in one command.
acceptance_criteria: a single command starts the local stack
README setup steps verified on a clean machine

tickets.title: Backend API
tickets.description: The REST endpoints and business logic the frontend and integrations depend on.

tickets.title: Build file upload intake endpoint
tickets.description: Accept user file uploads, validate type and size, and persist them to object storage.
acceptance_criteria: accepts allowed file types and rejects others
enforces a max size with a clear error
stored objects are retrievable by id

tickets.title: Seed fixture corpus and expected outcomes
tickets.description: Build an initial golden dataset to validate processing end to end.
acceptance_criteria: representative fixtures committed to the repo
a single command runs the comparison
